description: heels have never looked this interesting. These synthetic patent leather Mary Janes from catwalk are given a fresh twist with wedge heels. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses in shades of grey, black and brown.UpperSynthetic patent leather uppers with suede sides for comfort and high gloss lookBuckle strap for perfect FitFabric lining for added comfortSynthetic leather lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleWedge heel with textured sidesTPU outsole with heelTextured floral pattern on the outsole for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
